title: Ryanair to Expand Maintenance Facility at Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Ryanair has revealed its intention to expand its operations at Prestwick Airport by constructing a new base maintenance facility. The airline will also introduce new on-site component services as part of this expansion, enhancing its maintenance capabilities at the airport.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: This development is significant for both Ryanair and Prestwick Airport, as it aims to bolster the airline's operational efficiency in Scotland. The new facility is expected to create job opportunities and contribute to the local economy, aligning with the broader growth strategy of Ryanair in the region.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Ryanair To Expand Prestwick MRO Footprint
